description_long: This is a modern, two-seater couch with a sleek, low-profile design and a deep black color. The seat and backrest are both thickly cushioned, with the backrest featuring a diamond-quilted pattern that adds a touch of sophistication. The armrests are wide, slightly flared, and integrated into the overall form, providing ample support and comfort. The couch sits low to the ground, with short, barely visible legs that give it a grounded appearance. The upholstery appears to be a soft fabric, likely microfiber or velvet, with a matte finish. There are no visible accent pillows or decorative elements, emphasizing a minimalist, contemporary aesthetic.
description: A modern black two-seater couch with diamond-quilted backrest, wide flared armrests, and soft matte upholstery. The design is minimalist and low-profile.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full width, diamond-quilted backrest, and wide flared armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the thick seat and back cushions, as well as the low height and integrated armrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the continuous, smooth back and the subtle curvature of the armrests.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the depth of the seat and the armrest profile.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two integrated seat cushions and two attached, diamond-quilted back cushions; no loose or accent pillows visible.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Diamond-quilted pattern on the backrest with solid, matte fabric on the seat and armrests.
attribute_leg_style: Legs are short, minimally visible, and likely block-style, possibly wood or plastic, mostly hidden beneath the couch.
attribute_armrest_design: Armrests are wide, slightly flared, and integrated into the couch body, with a flat top and no visible padding or decorative features.
attribute_backrest_type: Backrest is medium-high, attached, and features a continuous, diamond-quilted cushioned surface divided into two sections.
